info.description: AI Real Estate Assistant API V4
info.title: AI Real Estate Assistant - Modern

post.description:
Get sheet names from an Excel file.

Returns available sheets and their row counts for sheet selection UI.

Trigger data ingestion from URLs.
Downloads CSV/Excel files, processes them, and saves to local cache.
Does NOT automatically reindex vector store (call /reindex for that).
Enforces max_properties limit from settings.

schema.title: Response Admin Metrics Api V1 Admin Metrics Get

get.description:
List all available portal adapters.

Returns information about each portal including:
- Whether it's configured (has API key if required)
- Rate limit information

post.description:
Fetch property data from an external portal.

Uses the specified portal adapter to fetch properties based on filters.
The fetched data is automatically ingested into the property cache.
Reindex data from cache to vector store.

schema.title: Response Request Code Api V1 Auth Request Code Post

post.description: Process a chat message using the hybrid agent with session persistence.

schema.title: Response List Prompt Templates Api V1 Prompt Templates Get

post.description:
Simple QA over uploaded knowledge with citations.
If LLM is unavailable, returns concatenated context as answer.
Clear all indexed knowledge documents for local RAG (CE-safe).

Upload documents and index for local RAG (CE-safe).
PDF/DOCX require optional dependencies; unsupported types return a 422 when nothing is indexed.
Search for properties using semantic search and metadata filters.

get.description: List available model providers and their models.

schema.title: Response List Model Catalog Api V1 Settings Models Get

get.description: Get notification settings for the current user.

put.description: Update notification settings for the current user.

get.description: Test connection/runtime status for a specific provider.

schema.title: Response List Tools Api V1 Tools Get

post.description:
Rank multiple properties by commute time to a destination.

Compares commute times from multiple properties to a common destination
and returns a ranked list from shortest to longest commute.

Calculate commute time from a property to a destination.

Uses Google Routes API to calculate accurate commute times including
real-time traffic conditions and transit schedules.
Calculate investment property metrics including ROI, cap rate, cash flow, and rental yield.
Calculate neighborhood quality index including safety, schools, amenities, walkability, and green space.

Calculate Total Cost of Ownership for a property.
Includes mortgage, property taxes, insurance, HOA fees, utilities, maintenance, and parking.

get.description:
Health check endpoint to verify API status.

Args:
    include_dependencies: Whether to check dependency health (vector store, Redis, LLM providers)

Returns:
    Comprehensive health status including dependencies

Prometheus-compatible metrics endpoint (TASK-017).

Returns application metrics in Prometheus text format.
